name: Fjordland Exploration Inc.
summary: Fjordland Exploration Inc., an exploration stage company, acquires and explores for mineral properties primarily in Canada. The company primarily explores for nickel-cobalt deposits in Labrador. It holds interests in the South Voisey's Bay property covering an area of 29,400 hectares located in central Labrador; Milligan West gold and copper project covering 15,736 hectares of area located to the northwest of Prince George; and the North Thompson Nickel Belt project covering an area of 18,685 hectares. The company also holds an agreement with Quebec Precious Metals Corporation to acquire a 100% interest in the Renzy nickel copper project located in Hainaut Township, Quebec. Fjordland Exploration Inc. was incorporated in 1996 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
